title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz General Global Group

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Bajaj Allianz General Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Bajaj Allianz General Global Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Nagpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Bajaj Allianz General Global Group:
Bajaj Allianz General Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz General Global Group!
